name: Cocoa Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 2/3 cup all purpose flour or 2 cups cake flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2.
3. Beat all ingredients together on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on high speed for an additional 3 minutes, scraping occasionally.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. The cake can be enjoyed without frosting, but you may frost it if desired.
